summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF Export feature for Leadway AI Readiness Admin Dashboard. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend PDF Report button works correctly and triggers download. CSV export still works. Existing pages (pre-training assessment, post-evaluation) are NOT broken.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - PDF button visible, download works, CSV still works

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test submissions via POST /api/submissions with TEST_ prefixed emails (TEST_john.doe@leadway.com, TEST_jane.smith@leadway.com, TEST_michael.brown@leadway.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export feature fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/admin/report/pdf returns valid PDF with correct headers (application/pdf, attachment disposition). Frontend has 'PDF Report' button with data-testid='export-pdf-btn' in admin dashboard header. PDF file is ~7KB with corporate Leadway branding. CSV export at /api/admin/export still works. Pre-training assessment at / and /assessment NOT broken. Post-evaluation at /post-evaluation NOT broken.

backend_apis.POST /api/submissions: PASS - Created 3 test submissions with scoring
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/report/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (200 status, application/pdf content-type, %PDF- header)
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/login: PASS - Accepts correct password, rejects invalid

frontend_ui.admin_login: PASS - Login page loads, accepts password
frontend_ui.admin_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats, charts, tabs
frontend_ui.pdf_report_button: PASS - Button visible in header with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'
frontend_ui.pdf_download: PASS - Clicking button triggers download of 'Leadway_AI_Readiness_Report.pdf'
frontend_ui.csv_download: PASS - Clicking button triggers download of 'leadway_ai_readiness_submissions.csv'
frontend_ui.toast_notifications: PASS - Shows 'PDF report downloaded' toast on success

existing_pages_not_broken.landing_page: PASS - / loads correctly with Start Assessment button
existing_pages_not_broken.post_evaluation_page: PASS - /post-evaluation loads with email dialog and 'How Far Have You Travelled?' headline
